ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was uploaded */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "upload_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the dataset */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., CSV, Excel, SQL) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_data_source FOREIGN KEY ("data_source") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_data_type FOREIGN KEY ("data_type") REFERENCES data_types ("type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_upload_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("upload_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "markers" (
  "marker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marker */,
  "marker_name" TEXT /* Name of the marker */,
  "marker_type" TEXT /* Type of marker (e.g., cyto_minus, cyto_plus) */,
  "marker_description" TEXT /* Description of the marker */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("marker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being tested */,
  "marker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the marker used in the test */,
  "test_name" TEXT /* Name of the statistical test */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date the test was performed */,
  "test_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test type */,
  "test_description" TEXT /* Description of the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_types" (
  "test_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test type */,
  "test_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the test type */,
  "test_type_description" TEXT /* Description of the test type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test the parameter belongs to */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "parameter_description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test the result belongs to */,
  "result_value" TEXT /* Value of the result */,
  "result_description" TEXT /* Description of the result */,
  "result_interpretation" TEXT /* Interpretation of the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_department FOREIGN KEY ("department") REFERENCES departments ("department_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_job_title FOREIGN KEY ("job_title") REFERENCES job_titles ("job_title_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset or test */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset or test was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test history entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the test was performed on */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date the test was performed */,
  "test_result" TEXT /* Result of the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "role_level" INTEGER /* Level of the role (e.g., 1, 2, 3) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the permission belongs to */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "markers_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "marker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the marker the type belongs to */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type */,
  "type_description" TEXT /* Description of the type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cyto_minus" (
  "cyto_minus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cyto_minus entry */,
  "marker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the marker the cyto_minus entry belongs to */,
  "cyto_minus_value" TEXT /* Value of the cyto_minus type */,
  "cyto_minus_description" TEXT /* Description of the cyto_minus type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cyto_minus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cyto_plus" (
  "cyto_plus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cyto_plus entry */,
  "marker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the marker the cyto_plus entry belongs to */,
  "cyto_plus_value" TEXT /* Value of the cyto_plus type */,
  "cyto_plus_description" TEXT /* Description of the cyto_plus type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cyto_plus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nuc_minus" (
  "nuc_minus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each nuc_minus entry */,
  "marker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the marker the nuc_minus entry belongs to */,
  "nuc_minus_value" TEXT /* Value of the nuc_minus type */,
  "nuc_minus_description" TEXT /* Description of the nuc_minus type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nuc_minus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nuc_plus" (
  "nuc_plus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each nuc_plus entry */,
  "marker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the marker the nuc_plus entry belongs to */,
  "nuc_plus_value" TEXT /* Value of the nuc_plus type */,
  "nuc_plus_description" TEXT /* Description of the nuc_plus type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nuc_plus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type */,
  "type_description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "department_description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_titles" (
  "job_title_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job title */,
  "job_title_name" TEXT /* Name of the job title */,
  "job_title_description" TEXT /* Description of the job title */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_title_id")
)
